Dual Commencement: The Russell Index Shift to Semi-Annual Rebalancing
Here's the biggest risk for Russell 2000 ETFs like IWM, VTWO
Dow, S&P And Nasdaq Poised For New Highs

holdings.infoBox: VTWO is an equity ETF with a total of 1957 individual holdings. The top holdings are Slbbh1142 stock at 2.18%, Bloom Energy at 1.79%, Credo Technology Group Holding at 1.09%, Sterling Infrastructure at 0.74%, and Fabrinet at 0.68%.

overview.description: The Vanguard Russell 2000 ETF (VTWO) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Russell 2000 index. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of US small-cap stocks. The index selects stocks ranked 1001-3000 by market capitalization. VTWO was launched on Sep 20, 2010 and is issued by Vanguard.

data.title: 1 under-the-radar ETF to invest $1,000 in right now that's outperforming major indexes this year
data.text: The Vanguard Russell 2000 ETF tracks nearly 2,000 small-cap stocks and has outperformed the S&P 500, Nasdaq and Dow Jones so far this year.
